title: お鍋に映るは、あなたの笑顔

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono has managed to leave a wonderful
mark on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Or so I thought. Three days ago, Hishi Akebono
and I went up into the mountains to find some
wild vegetables and herbs...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now, our phones are dead, we're almost out of
food, and the forest is so thick that I can't tell
east from west.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But despite being in dire straits...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Look, Trainer! I found some buono
veggies!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I should use them as a topping on
meat... Or should I use them for pasta? Oh!
Adding them to a stewed dish would be good too!
choice_data_list: How are you in such a good mood?
How are you in such a good mood?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Well, it's not often you get to see this
much greenery!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I found the wild vegetables I was looking
for!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but you're probably getting tired, huh? If
only we knew the way out of here...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, those two directions weren't the right way,
so why don't we try going this way next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be better to rest here instead of aimlessly
wandering around in my opinion, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! We can just turn around if it's the
wrong way.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's go! I'll give you a piggyback ride,
so hop on!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You must be exhausted, so you can take a nap on
my back if you want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After a little more back and forth...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono takes off with me—a fully grown
man—and all of our bags strapped to her back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono takes off with me—a fully grown
woman—and all of our bags strapped to her back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's not long until we arrive at...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! I don't have any idea where we are!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We sure are in a pickle! Oh well, let's have lunch
for now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I actually caught a fish earlier, so we can have
porridge with wild veggies and grilled fish today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono sets to work with such zeal that
you'd never guess she's been lost in the woods for
three whole days.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
First, I have to clean the fish, salt it, then grill it
over the fire.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Next, I have to filter and boil some river water,
pour in rice, and add in the kombu seaweed and
the veggies...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, nothing! I was just thinking.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Once it starts boiling, it's time to add
the soy sauce... Ooh! That smells yummy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It'll be done in about thirty minutes, so just hang
in there a little longer, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The campfire crackles away as the smell of freshly
cooked rice and grilled fish fills the air.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I came to a surprising realization just earlier,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Whenever I cook, I always think about you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I thought about you today, and when I was
carving meat at the dorm the other day, and
when I made sushi with everybody last week too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm always wondering how you would look while
eating the food I make.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And I'm constantly daydreaming about how to
flavor things in order to make you happy...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Just now, I was brainstorming all the different
things I wish I could've added to the porridge to
match your tastes even more.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. It must be because you always enjoy my
cooking so much! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When I think back on it, I realize I've eaten a lot of Hishi Akebono's cooking over the past three years.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's made me chanko, chilled noodles, grilled
vegetables, an Italian holiday dinner, and
poached chicken.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And every time she served me food, she had a big
smile on her face too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I really love cooking for others.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But I think I love cooking for you the most,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So, um... I hope you'll continue eating tons and
tons of my cooking.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You will, won't you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Yay!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay, enough talk! Go ahead and eat! ☆ It's
piping hot and very buono!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like everything else she makes, Hishi
Akebono's grilled fish and veggie porridge is
criminally delicious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next morning, Hishi Akebono leads us out of
the forest and down the mountain just by
following her hunches!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you have a minute?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to apologize for getting us lost for all of
yesterday, and the day before that, and the one
before that...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
This isn't exactly an apology gift... but I packed
you a lunch with all of your favorites.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The box she hands me is very big and very warm.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Since the weather's so nice today, let's go outside
to eat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Outside, it's warm with a light breeze and truly
perfect for a good picnic.
choice_data_list:
(I can already tell today's lunch is going to be
amazing.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to keep up with Hishi Akebono while my
mouth waters in anticipation.
